input_row.title: Ensure 'Remote debugging' is set to 'Off'
input_row.remediation: Remediate from Azure Portal 1. Go to App Services or Function App. 2. Click the name of a function app. 3. Under Deployment, click Deployment slots. 4. Click the name of a deployment slot. 5. Under Settings, click Configuration. 6. In the General settings pane, under Debugging, set Remote debugging to Off. 7. Click Save. 8. Click Continue. 9. Repeat steps 1-8 for each function app and deployment slot requiring remediation. Remediate from Azure CLI For each deployment slot requiring remediation, run the following command to disable remote debugging: az resource update --name web --resource-group <resource-group-name> -- namespace Microsoft.Web --resource-type config --parent sites/<function-app- name>/slots/<deployment-slot-name> --set properties.remoteDebuggingEnabled=false Default Value: By default, remote debugging is set to off. References: 1. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/visualstudio/debugger/remote-debugging- azure-app-service 2. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/mcsb-posture- vulnerability-management#pv-2-audit-and-enforce-secure-configurations 3. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/functionapp 4. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/resource CIS Controls:

gpt_response:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** azure_app_services_remote_debugging_disabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
The automated program will check the "Remote debugging" setting for each Azure App Service and Function App deployment slot by leveraging Azure Resource Manager APIs or Azure CLI commands.

1. **Azure Resource Manager APIs / Azure CLI Commands:**
   - Use the Azure CLI command:
     ```bash
     az resource show --name <function-app-name> --resource-group <resource-group-name> --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites/config --parent <function-app-name>/slots/<deployment-slot-name>
     ```
   - This command retrieves the configuration for a specific deployment slot of the Function App.

2. **Specific resources to enumerate:**
   - Enumerate all App Services and Function Apps within a specified subscription and resource group. For each Function App, retrieve all associated deployment slots.

3. **Exact configuration properties/settings to validate:**
   - Check the property `remoteDebuggingEnabled`. It should be set to `false` for compliance.

4. **Clear Pass/Fail criteria with expected values:**
   - Pass: `remoteDebuggingEnabled` is `false`
   - Fail: `remoteDebuggingEnabled` is `true`

5. **Example API endpoint or CLI command:**
   - The command mentioned above can be utilized in a script to loop through all Function Apps and their deployment slots to check the setting according to the criteria specified.

By executing this program, security teams can ensure that remote debugging is disabled, which is a critical step in maintaining the security posture of Azure App Services.
